description: You are a middle school environmental science teacher preparing a lesson on biodiversity in Antarctica. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/penguin_analysis.py that analyzes the penguin dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/penguins.csv. The script must calculate the average body mass (body_mass_g) and average flipper length (flipper_length_mm) for the Adelie, Chinstrap, and Gentoo species, excluding any records where these values are missing or "NA". Round all averages to exactly one decimal place and export the results to /home/ga/Documents/penguin_summary.txt. Each line in the output file must include the species name and both calculated averages (e.g., "Adelie: mass 3700.7, flipper 189.9"). Ensure the script is executed so the summary file is generated.
